battleTraits.name: The Lurking Vermintide
battleTraits.summary: Pick an undeployed unit; it starts in the tunnels below. Units still there after round 3 without using Gnawhole Ambush are destroyed.
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that has not been deployed.
battleTraits.effect: The target is set up in reserve in the tunnels below. Units still in the tunnels after round 3 without using Gnawhole Ambush are destroyed.

battleTraits.name: Gnawhole Ambush
battleTraits.summary: Pick a unit in the tunnels below; set it up within 6" of a battlefield corner and more than 9" from all enemy units.
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit in the tunnels below.
battleTraits.effect: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a battlefield corner and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Cornered Rat
abilities.flavor: A Clawlord in fear for their life fights with rabid ferocity.
abilities.effect: While this unit is damaged, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its Warpforged Halberd.

abilities.name: Will of the Horned Rat
abilities.flavor: None among the Skaven clans may defy the commands of a Grey Seer — openly, at least…
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 13" of this unit, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, add the roll to the target's control score until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Wither
abilities.flavor: The Grey Seer hurls a glowing green globe of magical energy at the foe. Anyone touched by the globe starts to shrivel and wither away.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13", then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Unleashed Warp-Fury
abilities.flavor: Warpstone hammered into their flesh drives them into a frenzy.
abilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit. Then add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons this phase.

abilities.name: More-More Warp Energy!
abilities.declare: You declared a Shoot ability for this unit and it has not moved this turn.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Damage of its Warplock Musket to 3 this phase. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.

abilities.name: Seething Swarm
abilities.flavor: Clanrats overwhelm enemies with seemingly limitless numbers.
abilities.effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.

units.name: Rat Ogors
units.notes: 2 Rat Ogors with Claws, Blades and Fangs; 1 with Warpfire Gun and Claws, Blades and Fangs.
